title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Join the RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates family as a Financial Analyst in Delhi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates:
RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates!
